pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh cleanup path explicitly define this requirement.
Task description step 3 explicitly requests these widgets.
Task description step 4 explicitly requests this filter setting.
Task description step 5 explicitly requests this filter setting.
Task description step 6 explicitly requests this vertical scale.

privileged_info_summary: The correct final state requires saving a screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/emg_workspace.png. The GUI must display exactly two panels containing the 'Time Series' and 'EMG' widgets. The Bandpass filter must be set to '5-50 Hz' and Notch filter to 'None'. The vertical scale on the Time Series widget must be set to '200 uV'. The data source is specified as the built-in 'Synthetic (algorithmic)' session.
